faq.title: Answers before you launch
faq.subtitle: Quick explanations for the questions most first-time users ask.

telegramWhy.question: Why is Telegram the default channel?
telegramWhy.answer: Telegram is fast to set up, stable for long-running bots, and familiar to most users. It gives you a simple path to go live first, then expand to more channels later.

telegramCredentials.question: What are Telegram Bot Token and User ID?
telegramCredentials.answer: Bot Token is your bot's secret key from @BotFather. User ID is the numeric ID of who is allowed to chat with your bot - in most cases that's your own Telegram User ID (find it via @Getmyid_bot or @userinfobot). Token identifies the bot; User ID controls access.

hermesSwitch.question: Can I change a bot from Hermes Agent to OpenClaw later?
hermesSwitch.answer: No. Choose OpenClaw or Hermes Agent when creating the bot. To use the other runtime, create a new bot with that runtime.

cloudVsMacMini.question: Cloud server vs running OpenClaw or Hermes Agent on Mac mini: which is better?
cloudVsMacMini.answer: If you want the fastest OpenClaw or Hermes Agent setup and less ops work, cloud is usually better: installation is automated, uptime is easier to monitor, and support can handle server issues. Mac mini is great when you want full local control and already manage your own hardware. In practice, many users start in cloud and move parts in-house later.

modelRecommendation.question: Which AI model should I start with?
modelRecommendation.answer: If you are unsure, start with the default model that ClawSimple preselects for your plan. It is chosen for balanced quality, speed, and cost. You can switch models anytime later.

billingMethod.question: How does billing work?
billingMethod.answer: Billing is based on your plan, included AI/search usage, and any extra managed usage. New deployments use the ClawSimple platform AI connection and managed search by default; no provider key is required during setup.

addAgentBilling.question: Does adding another agent inside one deployment cost extra?
addAgentBilling.answer: Not as a separate server subscription. An extra agent reuses the same deployment and server, so you are not buying another server just to add one more bot. More agent traffic can consume the deployment's managed AI and search credits faster.

addAgentRequirements.question: What do I need to provide when adding an agent?
addAgentRequirements.answer: At minimum, a fresh Telegram Bot Token for that new bot and a platform model selection. The allowlist usually defaults to your saved Telegram User ID, but you can change it.

addAgentFlow.question: What is the actual flow for adding an agent?
addAgentFlow.answer: Go to Profile > Overview, open the deployment card, click Add Agent, fill in the bot token and model settings, then submit. ClawSimple queues an add_agent job, updates the running OpenClaw config on that same deployment, and the new bot appears as active once the job finishes.

addAgentCapacity.question: How many agents usually make one deployment feel resource-constrained, and do they share AI credits?
addAgentCapacity.answer: There is no single fixed number in the current product logic. A few light Telegram assistants on one deployment are usually fine; pressure shows up when several agents are all active at once, especially if they run long tool calls or heavier models. Managed AI credits are tracked at the deployment or seat level, so agents on the same deployment share that usage bucket.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: ClawSimple provides managed deployment services for OpenClaw and Hermes Agent. We make it easier to run personal AI bots without server setup and maintenance work.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: We keep OpenClaw and Hermes Agent deployments usable for people who want the bot, not the server work.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: Questions? Reach out to us at

data.title: Data We Collect
data.content: We collect minimal data necessary to provide our services: your email address for authentication, deployment configuration, and billing information. We do not store your API keys—after your server is initialized, your keys are discarded.

keys.title: API Keys
keys.content: Your Telegram bot token is used to set up your server. New deployments use ClawSimple platform AI and managed search by default, so you do not need to provide AI provider keys during setup.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at privacy@clawsimple.com

workflowLabels.rankingHint: Ranked by verification, setup effort, and time to first result
workflowLabels.partialHint: Usable, but best started from the template. Free-form requests may still produce inconsistent results.
workflowLabels.unverifiedHint: Not yet officially validated in this cycle.

service.title: Service Description
service.content: ClawSimple provides automated server deployment and management services for OpenClaw bots. Services are provided on a subscription basis with monthly or yearly billing intervals.

payment.title: Payment & Billing
payment.content: Subscription fees are charged monthly or yearly in advance. You can cancel your subscription at any time. Service continues until the end of the current billing period.

credits.title: Credits
credits.content: Purchased credits can be used only for managed AI and managed search/crawl usage. Credits expire 365 days after purchase, are not transferable, and cannot be exchanged for currency except where required by law.

refund.title: Refunds
refund.content: Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. If you experience service issues that we cannot resolve, please contact us for a refund consideration.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the service, including but not limited to data loss, service interruptions, or third-party API failures.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of any changes.

cta.title: Ready to deploy your own bot?
cta.description: Get your Telegram AI bot running in 3 minutes. No server setup required.

listing.title: Blog
listing.description: The latest updates, guides, and insights from the ClawSimple team.
